name: Chord Diagram
description: Publication-quality chord diagram with circular composition, semi-transparent ribbons, and precise geometry.
template:
Create a publication-quality chord diagram visualizing {prompt}

Style requirements:
- Bright ivory background with centered circular composition
- Harmonious palette: cobalt, teal, ochre, coral, plum, graphite
- Mathematically precise with clean arcs and semi-transparent ribbons
- Highly legible labels around outer segments
- Ribbon thickness implies volume while maintaining readability
- Crisp labels with clear hierarchy and accurate geometry
- Refined data-journalism aesthetic

Density control:
- 6-12 outer segments around the circle
- Numeric ticks at regular intervals
- Small legend for categories
- Balanced white space with elegant composition
